hero.headline: Your moment deserves the perfect photographer
hero.description: Lomissa is a photography marketplace connecting clients with professional photographers. Browse, book, and receive your photos — all in one place.

howItWorks.label: HOW IT WORKS
howItWorks.heading: Book a photographer in minutes
howItWorks.step1Desc: Explore hand-picked photographers and find the perfect match for your style and budget.
howItWorks.step2Desc: See real availability, pick a date that works and book in minutes. No back and forth.
howItWorks.step3Desc: Have your session and receive your professionally edited photos through Lomissa.

trust.label: WHY LOMISSA
trust.heading: Every photographer is hand-picked
trust.vettedDesc: Every photographer on Lomissa goes through a personal review process. Only the best make it.
trust.bookingDesc: See real availability and book in seconds. No waiting, no back and forth emails.
trust.reviewsDesc: Every review comes from a real client who completed a real session. No fake ratings.

forPhotographers.label: FOR PHOTOGRAPHERS
forPhotographers.heading: Turn your passion into income
forPhotographers.description: Lomissa connects you with clients who are ready to book. No subscriptions — just a simple commission when you get paid.
forPhotographers.quote: Join the photography marketplace launching worldwide
forPhotographers.quoteNote: Be among the first photographers on Lomissa.

footer.tagline: The photography marketplace connecting clients with hand-picked photographers worldwide.

search.placeholder: Search by name, location or specialty...

noResults.heading: No photographers found

panel.feature1Desc: Every photographer is personally reviewed before joining
panel.feature2Desc: Your payment is protected until photos are delivered
panel.feature3Desc: Be among the first to discover Lomissa — a new way to find and book photographers
panel.photographerDesc: We hand-pick every photographer on Lomissa. Apply today and start receiving bookings from clients worldwide. You set your prices, we handle the rest.
